name: Maddie Cush
intro: Hey guys! My name is Maddie Cush, and I am a first year studying International Business and Economics. I am from Haddonfield, New Jersey, about five minutes from Philly(#GOEAGLES). I absolutely love to read; my favorite books are The Picture of Dorian Gray, All the Light We Cannot See, and The Kite Runner. I also am a shopaholic so if anyone likes fashion, I would LOVE to talk about recent MET Gala themes or go shopping together. I really like history, so if anyone has any historical novels they recommend, let me know. I am a huge Taylor Swift fan, but I also love Billy Joel, The Rolling Stones, and Bruce Springsteen(the best people are from Jersey). Please let me know if you ever want to grab a coffee and a bagel because I am always down!! I am so excited to meet everyone, I tend to talk a lot because I am an extrovert, so always feel free to come up to me if you see me!

name: Joana Gonçalves
intro: Hey guys, my name is Joana and I'm a first year Environmental and Sustainability Sciences Major. I'm Portuguese but I grew up moving around a lot but this is technically my first time in the US. I'm a big literature and reading person so I've loved seeing that I'm not the only one! I also listen to a lot of music, some of my favorites are Florence and the Machine, Ethel Cain, and Miss Swift of course. I'm also love exploring new places in Boston, the aquarium is currently next on my list so if anyone wants to come just let me know :)

name: Shivam Singhal
intro: Sup guys! My names Shivam and I'm a 2nd year Econ-Finance major with a minor in Polisci. Born in Florida(Gainesville/Tampa) but lived in Singapore for most of my life. Gotten into lifting recently and while writing this drank the most nasty protein shake. Catch me just casually blue biking around Boston (yearly membership goes hard) and lemme know if you're down to go on random walks and explore Boston or get brunch. Btw believe it or not, never been to the MFA so reach out if ur interested. Started watching football last year and obviously root for the Bucs (semi bandwagon) and we most definitely have a great future. Also a fair weather Heat fan since 2015. Listen to a lot of music from artists like Kanye, Joji, Tyler the Creator, Still Woozy and a big podcast listener. Avid film fan and I watch anything and everything (lemme know if you have any recs or want some). Favorite film studio is A24 and I'm currently watching The Sopranos. Also on and off been playing COC since I was 11 (looking for a new clan). Super excited to be part of this community and look forward to meeting all you guys.

name: Deven Patel
intro: Wassup everyone! My name is Deven and I'm a first year Bioengineering major with a minor in business, and I was born and raised right outside of Austin, Texas. One of my newer interests has been learning how to cook, I find it really fun and I also just love food. One of my favorite dishes to make is eggplant parmesan, and my favorite cuisines are definitely Italian and Indian. I really want to explore the food scene in Boston, so if anyone ever wants to try a new place or has any recommendations hmu! I am also a huge sports fanatic (both playing and watching), and my favorite teams are the San Antonio Spurs and Liverpool. I go to Marino every once in awhile to play pickup basketball, and I've also heard rumors that there is a TAMID basketball team which I would be super excited to join! Music is also an interest of mine, and my top artists have got to be Drake, PARTYNEXTDOOR, the Weeknd, and Skepta! I couldn't be more excited to be part of such an amazing community, and I am really looking forward to getting to know all of you!

name: Rachel Chen
intro: Hi you guys, my name is Rachel and I'm a first year studying Computer Science & Mathematics. I live in Lexington, MA which is like 20 minutes outside of Boston which is great and I definitely don't go home when I'm sick. I've played soccer since forever and I need to get back to playing it desperately. Like everyone else I'm in love with food and I'm always down to get food with you, food is one of the worlds greatest wonders. I love the Weeknd, Tory Lanez, Frank Ocean, Steve Lacy, Kendrick, J. Cole, Lucky Daye, etc. I'm also a reader (I just finished Dune book 1 and starting book 2!) and I'm into sci-fi, history, political intrigue, and psychological thrillers. Always feel free to send me recs. I love talking philosophy and thought experiments although I'm not really well-informed, so feel free to come up to me and ask me about things like the trolley problem. Last fun fact about me is I'm obsessed with mobile games like you will find me playing brawl stars in fundies I'm not ashamed, sorry lerner. Anyways, I'm super stoked to be a part of TAMID and I look forward to meeting all of you guys!

name: Nikkita Pandey
intro: Hiiii!! My name is Nikkita and I'm a first year studying Biology and Finance. I'm from Philly (go Eagles) and I'm so excited to be in TAMID! I absolutely love writing poetry/short fiction and I love love love reading so if there's anyone who wants to go to a tiny bookstore and watch me spend all my money let me know :) I also love watching movies and just consuming artistic media in contrast to my academic interests. My favorite genres are always thrillers(mainly psychological) and fantasy. I definitely want to explore Boston more so comment any recommendations for cute places. I'm a coffee addict so if anyone wants to go to a cafe hmu anytime!! My favorite artists are The Weeknd, Steve Lacy, Frank Ocean, Mitski, and Joji. I'm always down to do something random and fun so just reach out!!

name: Ari Kaden
intro: Hi everyone! My name is Ari Kaden and I am a second-year majoring in Biology and Political Science with a minor in International Affairs. I have lived in Chicago my whole life so I am always excited to meet other midwesterners (btw Boston is waaaay windier than Chicago). I like to say that I am a Chicago sports fan but our teams don't always make it super easy. Growing up I ran cross country and track and played volleyball and soccer. I have also taken up tennis this year with some friends. My family tries to hit a new national park every year so I love hiking and being outdoors. My all-time favorite has been Zion in Utah. I also love to ski (snow and water) and I am trying to take my first ski trip on the East coast. Please lmk if you have good ski mountain recommendations in New England!! My music taste is a little all over the place but recently I've been into indie pop artists like Noah Kahan and Vance Joy. I am also an aspiring foodie so if you know any good places to eat around Boston or any good recipes, please hmu! I am so excited to get to know you all and be part of the TAMID community!!

name: Gregory Marchev
intro: Hey everyone! My name is Greg and I'm a first year studying Data Science and Finance. I'm from Sudbury, MA, which is a small town located half an hour west of Boston. I love anything that has to do with soccer, whether it's following the sport (my favorite teams are Tottenham and CSKA Sofia) or playing it (scored a hatty in my 4-1 intramural W last night I'm kinda a big deal). I also love listening to music—some of my favorite artists are Frank Ocean, Tyler the Creator, Kendrick Lamar, and Adele. I also really enjoy traveling. Some of my favorite places that I've visited include Venice, Maui, Munich, Suzhou, and Teteven (small village in Bulgaria). Whenever I get the chance, I try to hit the gym and am currently working towards my goal of benching 225 by the end of the semester. Lastly, although I suck at cooking, I like to consider myself a foodie and am always looking for new spots and dishes to try (I'm a very un-picky eater and am open to any recommendations). I love getting to know people and chatting about absolutely anything, so don't hesitate to reach out!

name: Tanmay Shah
intro: Hey guys, my name is Tanmay, and I am a first year CS & Econ major. I was born and brought in Mumbai, India. I enjoy running, trying out new food (would love to try out different places for tamid chats but am a vegetarian tho) and listening to rap(my favorites are Eminem, J.Cole, Kendrick). Some of my favorite tv shows are Suits, SharkTank, Brooklyn 99 and How I met your mother. Can't wait to meet all of y'all.

name: Nicole O'Keefe
intro: Hello! My name is Nicole O'Keefe, but you can call me Cole. I am a first-year majoring in Environmental Sustainability Sciences and Economics. I grew up in Washington state and Colorado. I love doing pretty much anything in the outdoors: hiking, biking, kayaking, skiing, and fishing. Outside of class, you can find me wandering around the fens, at the gym, or listening to music. I love plants, reading, and recently dinosaurs. I am currently learning how to skateboard and play the guitar. If anyone is knowledgeable of these activities know that I'm bad and need help! I am a big fan of unplanned adventures, so reach out if you want to go explore. I'm grateful to be able to get to know everyone and be a part of the TAMID community. Looking forward to the retreat.

name: Dylan Hakim
intro: Hi everyone, my name is Dylan, and I'm a first year studying business. I was born in Los Angeles and moved to a small little coastal town in northern California called Carmel when I was 7. I'm a huge fan of nature and I like spending my time outdoors (maybe not so much in this weather, but I'm slowly adapting). I played volleyball all throughout high school for the school and on club teams and I'd love to join some sort of intermural team while I'm here at Northeastern. In the new I like to stay active by doing yoga and pilates as well as boxing and just going to the gym when I can. I can't wait to start doing TAMID chats and getting to know everyone, but I'm definitely someone who likes to do an activity while having a conversation so I'd love to go on walks or explore some places I haven't been to yet around town with you guys. I'm always up for a new adventure! Also, a fun fact about me: I love watching football and throwing the ball around if I ever get a chance. I don't have a specific affiliation to any team, I just simply like watching the sport. I can't wait to get to know all of you more and join the community!!

name: Hazelyn Aroian
intro: hey guys!! my name is Hazelyn and I'm a second year studying Computer Science and English. I'm from Maynard, MA, about half an hour out of Boston. i absolutely love to read— fiction, poetry, and nonfiction (i've been super into books on tech policy/regulation and philosophy of tech lately). i'm also a big cafe person (Farmers Horse!!) and could spend hours at a bookstore or library so if anyone ever wants to go pleaseeee lmk!! i also love listening to music! some of my favorite genres are shoegaze, indie folk, and 70s folk rock and some of my favorite artists are Fleetwood Mac, Lush, Taylor Swift, Tom Petty, Lucy Dacus, and the Shins (but SO many more). i really love being outside and hiking (Acadia National Park in Maine is my happy place). i also went skiing for the first time ever last weekend and had a fantastic time!! retreat today was so much fun— i'm so excited to be here, start doing TAMID chats and just get to know y'all better, please don't hesitate to reach out!!

name: Phuong Pham
intro: Hey guys! I'm Phuong and I'm a first year Business student concentrating in management (although that will probably change to finance). I'm from Ho Chi Minh City (Saigon), Vietnam, but I was born in Rockville, Maryland. I don't watch a lot of sports, but I do follow college football (kind of) and a bit of the NFL. I know how to play most sports but I suck at all of them. Nonetheless I would do be down to play with anyone anytime. I love love listening to music. My music taste is kinda all over the place but 2010-2015 EDM and early 2000s R&B are the vibes right now. Looking forward to working with everyone! Oh and if anyone plays Clash of Clans, whats your Town Hall Level? Cuz mines higher.

name: Aahil Jubair
intro: Whats up guys, I'm Aahil and I am a first year Computer Science and Business major. I'm from north jersey. I participated in NU.i.n London last semester and really enjoyed the experience. I love to travel, would like to spend a good amount of time this summer exploring different places. Almost always down for any trips or anything like that. I have played basketball my whole life and enjoy hooping at marino or any gym. Also into fitness, music, skateboarding (needs a little work at the moment). I am into all different genres, hip hop (drake, kendrick), r&b, pop, classics, or indie music.

name: Angela Mo
intro: Hi everyone, I'm Angela and I'm a first year CS and Business major. I'm from Livingston, NJ, but my family just moved to Wellesley, MA, so that's where I'll be during breaks lol. I love snowboarding, cooking/baking (but honestly just eating), and watching shows and movies. I have a bunch of fav artists but some are Kendrick, 21 Savage, Tyler the Creator, Dominic Fike, and The Weeknd. Fred Again also goes so hard when I'm studying. I also love a good bagel so please recommend me some places to go in Boston. I miss NJ bagels so much. I'm so down to try any new type of cuisine or any kind of restaurant/cafe, so hit me up and let's explore! I really enjoy traveling; I'm half Chinese and half Mongolian and I go back to visit family every other year along with some other countries along the way. I was a competitive gymnast for a big portion of my life, but I unfortunately lost most of the muscle I gained over the years so if anyone's down to go to the gym let's do it. I'm so excited to be a part of TAMID and I can't wait to get to know all of you!!

name: Tommy Fitzgerald
intro: Yooo my name is Tommy & l'm a first year CS and Design major from Louisville, KY. Something I'm obsessed with is using my body for anything & everything it's made to do (lol weird wording): I'm in love with running, skiing (water & snow), climbing, hiking, mountain biking, swimming, lifting, and sometimes playing basketball. Also, I am an artist who has recently taken his creativity into fields such as object design, lyric-writing, and marketing. When it comes to music, my top three genres are rap/r&b, folk/alternative, and pop/edm (literally 6 but whatever). A few of my favorites artists are Gunna, Joey Bada$$, Kendrick Lamar, 6LACK, Summer Walker, Vance Joy, Mumford and Sons, The National, Coldplay, Dua Lipa, Clean Bandit, and Loud Luxury. Hot take I hate The Weeknd. ALSO I run an art account on instagram and I co-run a food account for food reviews on places based in my hometown (mostly). Check those out [tommy_.chive & 502.food]. I'm so excited to get to know y'all and be a part of this driven community of exotic, fun people!

name: Naomi Mallik
intro: Hey guys, I'm Naomi, I'm a first year Business and Design major and I'm from the Bay Area. I really like hiking and going to the beach (really missing the California sun right now) and I've been trying to improve my cooking skills lately. I've played basketball my whole life and enjoy watching it, especially the Warriors, but haven't really been following them this season. I love Mac Miller, Tame Impala, Kendrick, SZA, Isaiah Rashad, but am trying to expand my music taste so if you have any recs please lmk. Im stoked to get to know everyone in TAMID and can't wait for this semester of Education!

name: Nidhi Jadhav
intro: hi everyone! my name is nidhi, and I'm a first year studying cs + business (potentially minoring in math). i was born in austin, texas but i grew up in nj. i love traveling, reading, drawing, cooking/baking and watching movies, shows, n f1. I'm really excited to explore boston, so pls drop recs (esp thrifting n brunch places). i also love listening to music (feel free to send recs as long as its not country or taylor swift) and am always making playlists in my free time. the highlight of my life was getting into tamid ong and i can't wait to meet u guys!!

name: Sneha Kondru
intro: hey guys!! my name is sneha and im from princeton, new jersey (don't slander jersey to me i love it there). i was, however, born in Boston and lived in California so I've been all over. I'm studying Data Science and Finance with a minor in Sociology and hoping to go into the investment fund. i LOVE to be outdoors and go hiking and visit national parks. this summer my family and i actually took a week long trip and visited four national parks (and hiked the narrows if any of u know what that is) and im going to sedona in april! i also love to stay active in different ways so hmu if u ever wanna go to revd together or try something new. i love to try new food or generally just go out and explore boston so if u do too we can exchange recs!! tbh i love to listen to all kinds of music but country has a very special place in my heart. other than that i love frank ocean, brent faiyaz, drake, sza, jack johnson, michael jackson, a boogie, the camp rock and let it shine soundtracks and so much more (clearly all over the place). my favorite show in the entire world is How I Met Your Mother and yes, i do think it's better than Friends. a fun fact about me is that i carry my family's old 2012 digital camera around with me everywhere. i actually have an account with over 230 posts of all the photos i take on the camera so you'll def see me with it at some point (shameless plug @throughthedigital). i can't wait to meet you all and i'm so excited to be a part of this amazing community.

name: Dani Lomazoff
intro: Hi guys!! My name is Dani and I'm from Bryn Mawr, PA (right outside of philly dilly). I am currently studying Business and Psychology and hoping to be in the consulting track! I am bilingual with my first language being Russian. I love running on the Esplanade (the camp rock playlist makes me RUN so I highly recommend), playing tennis, going on walks around boston, reading books— specifically personal growth/psychology ones at the moment (give me fun recs if you have any), going out to din with friends or doing picnics, and just doing random fun things that channel my inner child like painting and going on swings. I also love exploring so message me if you ever wanna try something new around here and I will most likely be down. I am unhealthily obsessed with Friends and have it on at all times in my room even if it's muted (such a comfort show) and also love Gilmore Girls especially right now during the fall time. My music ranges from Taylor swift (always and forever a swifty), Noah Kahan and the Lumineers, to Zach Bryan and other fun country music. I am so excited to get to know everyone and be a part of such an incredible community.

name: Sasha Goltsman
intro: hii guys!! my name is alexandra but everyone calls me sasha (weird nickname for alexandra ik, it's a russian thing). I'm an Econ and Psych major from Livingston, New Jersey and am really missing good bagels right now. Growing up, ballet was a really big part of my life but I started fencing in 8th grade and that pretty much took over everything else. I loovveee skiing, pickle ball, and going to festivals/concerts. I make a lot of playlists in my free time and like discovering new music or making beats. I listen to literally everything ranging from house, classical, r&b, classic rock, and soul so send recs :)) I wish I could say I have a fav tv show but tbh have never finished anything I started watching. I could however watch hours of architectural digest or "the cut" videos on youtube lol. my guilty pleasure is buying baseball hats and sneakers and spending way too much $ on Yerba Mates... I'm so excited to be a part of this incredible community and can't wait to get closer to all of you awesome people. p.s. If you like sushi, shoes, or the nj devils, we will definitely get along.

name: Izzy Sung
intro: Hi everybody!! I'm Izzy Sung (full name Isabel but people rarely call me that unless I'm in trouble lol) and I'm a second year from Princeton NJ!! I'm a Communication & Media Studies major and hope to be on the consulting track! I did the whole NUin bit and was in Dublin, but I have to say while I love Europe I do love Boston more. I'm an ex-ballerina — did it my whole life but then quit my sophomore year of high school — and am trying to get back into that hopefully but I also love skiing and cooking/baking. also a HUGEEE fan of pickleball… was in a pickleball league this summer and am down to play with anybody soooo…. My favorite movie of all time is La La Land (I can play the theme on the piano hehe) and my favorite TV show is Gilmore Girls. I'm a die-hard Swiftie and cried at the Eras Tour this summer. My music taste is literally all over the place but bottom line is as long as I can dance to it it's a yes in my book. Fun fact is that I have my mom's old film camera that is currently retired but am happy to bring it out of retirement for all you lovely people. I'm so excited to get to know all of you and can't wait to join this amazing community!!!

name: Elisabeth Clements
intro: Hey everyone! My name is Elisabeth Clements and I'm from Howell, NJ (central Jersey). I firmly believe that NJ is the best state and will take every opportunity possible to convince you of that (realllly missing nj bagels rn). I am majoring in Mechanical Engineering and minoring in Business Analytics. I did NUin Greece last year. It was cool. Most of my free time is spent taking walks on the Esplanade. If anyone has any good walking podcast recs please lmk. I love playing hockey and am on the club team here at Northeastern. Growing up I also played lacrosse and soccer. Other than that I love hiking, going to the beach, and baking/cooking (and eating). I also really like exploring new places around Boston. I am obsessed with my dog, Cali. She is my phone background and I will probably show you pictures of her at some point. I hate starting new TV shows, so I pretty much watch The Office, Modern Family and Gilmore Girls on repeat. I don't have the attention span to watch movies, but I want to start getting into them so give me your favorite movie recs! I have a pretty random, but elite taste in music. My favorite artists are Noah Kahan (if anyone has extra tickets to his concert at Fenway…), Taylor Swift, Jack Johnson, Luke Combs, Zach Bryan and the Lumineers. I am so excited to get to know you all and be part of the TAMID community!!

name: Sanjit Kosaraju
intro: Hey guys! My name is Sanjit Kosaraju, and I'm a first year studying Business Admin and Cybersecurity. I'm from San Ramon, California, which is about a 30 minute drive from San Francisco. I've been in San Ramon my entire life, so the weather switch is going to be interesting but I'm oddly excited for the snow. I love playing sports, but especially Basketball and Football, which I've been playing for about 10 years now. I also ran Cross Country and Track in high school, so I love running, and I've also started to learn how to ski over the last 3 years. I also love watching sports, including the NFL, NBA, and MLB, and I am a die-hard Eagles fan (I swear I'm not a bandwagon, I've liked the Eagles since the Sam Bradford phase). I usually spend my Sundays watching NFL Redzone and agonizing over my fantasy team (I'm 1-3 this year but have made the playoffs for the past 6 years). I also love the Warriors (I know this is a bad look for the not-a-bandwagon claim), and play fantasy basketball as well. I love listening to music, and some of my favorite artists are Drake, Travis Scott, The Weeknd, Uzi, Carti, and Kendrick Lamar. I also enjoy watching TV shows, and some of my favorite TV shows are Mr.Robot, Succession, and Suits. I play video games as well, although it's mostly 2K and Madden, and I am one of the best Madden players (self-proclaimed) you will ever meet. I can't wait to meet you all (even if you are a Cowboys fan), and am super excited to be a part of the TAMID community!

name: Emily Massard
intro: Hey guys! I'm Emily and I'm originally from France and China but I lived in Bangkok, Thailand, so being cold is a new thing for me. I'm a second year studying International Business with a concentration in accounting and a minor in Data Science. I would be open to both pursuing the consulting or tech consulting track. I also speak French and Mandarin fluently. I love doing anything active; so like running along the esplanade ofc, going to a workout class (spin, pilates, yoga), I used to run track, play soccer and touch rugby (which is basically organized tag) and walking with music or a podcast always hits. I have actually never played pickleball before, so I don't understand the hype but definitely excited to try it out. I love my daily matchas in the morning, thrifting (although boston thrifting kinda sucks). I stress bake banana bread, so I have made 6 banana breads since coming back to college this year. I can't lie... I've been cheffing it up as well (I even have an food instagram account with my roommates, go show some love: cheffing628) I'm a Love Island stan and cannot wait for the new all stars season. Although I love Gilmore Girls, Gossip Girls and all I can't bring myself to rewatch shows, so always on the hunt for new shows!! I don't know what my music taste, I honestly like everything from Hamilton to Drake. Super excited to get to know everybody in TAMID!

name: Gregory Laursen
intro: Hi! My name is greg and I'm from palo alto, california. I'm studying data science and international affairs and hoping to join tech consulting! I love being outdoors and especially surfing and hiking (I'm super excited because I'm going to chile over winter break to hike in patagonia). I'm also really into learning languages (currently learning hebrew and french if anyone wants to help me practice) so I listen to a lot of music and watch tv in different languages. I have playlists for a bunch of different languages and vibes but some of my favorite artists are swing, lede markson, frah quintale, tagua tagua, tuna, and ravid plotnik (I also listen to a lot of like zach bryan, caamp, and mac miller though). The office and how I met your mother are always my go-to shows to binge. I also enjoy cooking, reading, watching hockey and running (kinda lol). I hate video games but my roommate has a wii so I've been killing wii sports lately. I'm really excited to meet all of you guys and be a part of the tamid community!

name: Tanya Sawhney
intro: Hi guys!! My name is Tanya and I am from Singapore. I am currently doing a major in Economics and Business Administration and a minor in Data Science. I am really interested in consulting and I am surprisingly liking data science so I gained an interest in tech consulting as well. I absolutely LOVE to travel and explore places (my friends and I are actually doing a road trip to Niagra Falls this weekend!) but I honestly haven't really gone to many places in Boston yet so hmu if you want to do something new in the city because I would love to. I am a massiveeee foodie and have tried to take up cooking (follow my roommates and my chef account @207chefss), though I reallllyy am not the best cook I would call myself an expert at making box cake! While I do love nights at home cooking dinner, baking, and watching a movie, I am also always down to go out, see the city, and have fun! I also absolutely love going to concerts, I just saw Cigarettes After Sex 3 weeks ago and they were phenomenal (definitely recommend) so if you hear about an artist coming I will 100% tag along. I love drawing and painting, I never heard of spikeball before coming to Northeastern but the way it's been hyped up I really want to try and of course I lovee music. My favorite artists are Taylor Swift, Khalid, Frank Ocean, Steve Lacy, Jaden, Lauv, and Sza. All in all, I am soo exited to be apart of Tamid and I cannot wait to get to know you all soon!!

name: Kabir Kathuria
intro: What's up guys, my name is Kabir and I'm from Monroe, NJ. I'm a second-year Computer Science and Business Administration student (most likely concentrating in AI), and I'm hoping to join the tech consulting track. I love to work out and play sports, especially basketball and spikeball (always down to run it at Marino or carter). I also enjoy watching sports, and I am a big Chicago Bulls and Philadelphia Eagles fan. I'm 1-3 in my fantasy football league though, so there's a chance I might have to take a blow-up doll out on a date if my team continues to disappoint. Some of my other hobbies include collecting fragrances, trying new restaurants, and watching horror movies. One of my favorite things to do is to go to the mall and spend the entire day in sephora or macy's just smelling colognes. Lmk if you guys ever need any recs. I'm also always listening to music, mainly rap and r&b. Some of my favorite rappers are travis scott, drake, gunna, and kanye, and some of my favorite r&b artists are summer walker, tory lanez, partynextdoor, and bryson tiller. Super excited to be part of the TAMID community, and I can't wait to meet everyone!

name: Yuna Shin
intro: Hi guys!! My name is Yuna Shin and I'm from Closter, New Jersey which is like 20 minutes from NYC. I'm so excited to be part of the TAMID Tsade class and to meet all of you! I'm majoring in Business and Psychology, with an interest in concentrating in marketing. In my free time, I love taking naps!, finding corgis, playing tennis, exploring the city, and eating different cuisines. I'm passionate about film, fashion, art, self-growth/improvement, kpop, kdramas, skincare, marketing, entrepreneurship, and staying active. I love music whether it's playing the piano, karaoke, or listening to my playlists on spotify. If anyone wants to walk in the park and get to know each other, play tennis, get coffee at tatte's in the morning or explore the city together, try new restaurants, I'd be so excited to do it with you :)

name: Evan Schrier
intro: Hey y'all! My name is Evan Schrier and I am a 2nd Yr studying Finance & Supply Chain with a minor in Data Science! I'm originally from New Rochelle, NY, but moved to Memphis, TN before my freshmen year of high school. I'm a huge Yankees and Grizzlies fan and will talk sports all day! I am also a big skier (both water and snow) and love to try new foods. I love listening to all types of music but am currently escaping my summer country vibes for chill/throwback rap. Im a huge fan of The Blacklist, Suits, and Survivor, and could talk about the shows for hours in end. A fun fact about myself is that I'm a twin, but I don't know who's older because my parents never told us! My sister goes to WashU and is also a business major. I love Boston and have loved my time at Northeastern thus far, and cannot wait to begin my time in TAMID alongside the Tsade class! Feel free to reach out and Slack me, and let me know if you'd be interested in grabbing lunch (I've got swipes!) walking around town, or hanging out on campus!

name: Adi Srinivas
intro: Hi guys! My name is Aditya but you can call me Adi for short. I'm from Princeton, NJ and have lived there my whole life. I'm a second year studying Finance and Economics with a minor in Data Science, however, I was apart of the NU-Bound program so this is my first year on campus and actually in Boston. I've been fortunate to travel and see a bunch of places while growing up and in London, having seen over 25 countries in my lifetime. I've been playing an Indian percussion instrument called the Mridangam for over 13 years and enjoy learning about my Indian roots and culture. In my free time, I love watching and playing sports, being outdoors, and trying new foods. Judge if you want, but I'm a huuuge Lebron fan! I played varsity tennis all throughout high school and have recently been getting into different net sports such as pickleball, table tennis, spike-ball and badminton. I also love playing basketball and football with friends as well. During Sundays, I dedicate the day to checking my fantasy football team (3-1 btw) and watching the broncos games even though they suck. Besides that, you can always catch me watching food videos on instagram, luxury travel and sports highlights on Youtube, or simply browsing Zillow for absolutely no reason. My favorite artists are Drake (currently listening to the new album), Travis Scott, Lil Baby and Sza. I don't really watch TV shows but would love to get into it so please drop some recs! I'm so excited to be apart of the TAMID community and can't wait to make memories with you guys!

name: Charles Adams
intro: Hey guys! My name is Charlie and I am from Falmouth, Maine. I am currently studying civil engineering with a minor in business administration - I am hoping to join the consulting track! I am super excited to be a part of TAMID! Growing up I played soccer, hockey and I ran track. Some hobbies of mine are playing cello and lifting weights. I love all music but I really love country music. My favorite artists are Luke Combs, Ian Munsick and Zac Bryan among so many more. Additionally, I am not a movie person. I enjoy watching TV but I find myself on a never-ending cycle of watching The Office, How I met your mother, Breaking Bad, Peaky Blinders and Suits. I love Dan Brown books - of the Da Vinci code series my favorite is Angels and Demons. I am living in an apartment this year and although my cooking experience is more than limited I took the jump for no meal plan - any and all cooking tips and or recipes would be greatly appreciated! Seriously I cannot cook. I am very excited to get to know all of you and look forward to TAMID chats as well as seeing you all at events!

name: Kevin Polackal
intro: Whats up guys! My name is Kevin and I am a second year Computer Science major. I was originally born in Bengaluru, India and lived there for all of 2 months before arriving in the U.S where I've been living in Lexington, MA for the last 13 years. I joined Northeastern as part of the NU.in program in London and let me just say that its tough coming back to the T in Boston after being spoiled with the Tube. I'm a part of Northeastern's club tennis team and have been playing since I was 10 years old so if anyone ever wants to play hit me up! In general though I just love playing sports and I'm always down for a competitive game of Spikeball, basketball, or anything else. I'm a massive Boston sports fan, especially the Celtics (We are so winning this year) so if anyone is ever down to go watch a game I'd be excited to come with! In terms of music, recently I've been listening to a lot of Metro Boomin over the summer especially his recent Spiderman album (Hummingbird is SUCH a good song). SZA and Joji have also been pretty heavy listens. I love being in nature, most recently I went to Acadia National Park and one of my bucket list items is to visit all 63 national parks. So hyped to meet everyone and incredibly excited to start my journey with TAMID!

name: Ali Barta
intro: Hi guys!!! I'm Ali and I currently live in Charlotte, North Carolina. However, I have lived half my life outside of Atlanta and then the other half in a small town called York, Pennsylvania. I am a Finance and Business Analytics major, and I hope to be a part of the consulting track! I'm also a second year, however, I was one of those NUBound kids who spent their entire first year in London so I'm still brand new to the Boston campus (let me know of nearby food recommendations please)!!! Living in London, I was fortunate to be able to travel a lot and now I'm addicted to budget travel. I'm already planning potential trips for next summer (shoutout to the Skyscanner app)! On another note, I have a deep passion for playing tennis and pickleball with friends even though I'm definitely not the best at either. In fact, senior year of high school, I convinced my gym teacher to let me and my friends play pickleball each day for the semester. More fun facts include that I am a second-degree black belt and instructed Tae Kwon Do to kids all during high school, and I have worked off and on at Dunkin for the past couple of years so I always order the strangest drinks when I go now. I'm obsessed with stalking Spotify playlists. I am one of the biggest Swifties you will ever meet and would literally die for Taylor. I also am the very proud owner of the cutest dog you will ever lay your eyes on: a golden retriever named Bentley. Lastly, I am currently obsessed with buying and reselling clothes online. I can't wait to get to know all of you guys, and I'm so excited I get to be part of the TAMID community!!!

name: Gayatri Kondabathini
intro: Hey guys! My name is Gayatri, and I'm from Shrewsbury, MA (just 40 min outside of Boston). I'm a first-year pursuing Computer Science and Business Administration and I hope to join the Investment Fund track. In high school, my friends and I would often visit Boston to go shopping, for dinners, etc. so I'm not exactly a local, but I do know the place somewhat well. I'm always down to go somewhere new in the city so hmu! A little bit about me is that I've been dancing Bharatanatyam (a form of Indian classical dance) for 8ish years. I quit after high school, but I still love it. I love listening to music and podcasts— I always have my AirPods or Bose headphones in to the point where I'm concerned about my hearing. My all-time favorite music artists are Lana Del Rey, The Weekend, Steve Lacey, and Ariana Grande. I also love scrolling on Pinterest for hours, painting, and shopping (that includes window shopping). My favorite meal of the day is breakfast (my day is always better when I have a good brekkie). My current random obsession is vanilla yogurt from outtakes. Lately, I've been trying to do more mindful things like going on a walk (and appreciating the best season ever) and meditating before bed. A fun fact is that I have two younger brothers (they're twins! 11 years old). They used to be such cuties when they were babies. Now they're just menaces. I love watching Suits, Architectural Digest, and horror movies! Can't wait to be a part of TAMID and make good mems with you all.

name: Anish Karre
intro: Hey guys! I'm Anish and I'm from central mass and have always been a big boston fan. I'm currently a 2nd year studying CS and Econ, and I'm hoping to join the investment fund! I love being active so basketball, spikeball, anything competitive tbh you can sign me up for. A controversial take but running definitely takes the cake for me, I love lacing up and just going for a run up to the MIT bridge or the boston commons, but that's probably the track and XC in me. I'm big into sports (being a pats fan has been a rocky ride, so i stay busy with my fantasy team lmaoo) and love exploring the city. I wish the thrift scene in boston was a little better but you find the coolest things (highlight pickup in my short career would have to be a vintage polo quarter zip for a steallll - shrunk in the wash though). Some other things about me are that I love playing poker (if anyone wants to run some games I am so down), car guy (JDM) and I love photography. Something I'm trying to get into a bit more is reading, but I have a questionably weak attention span so we'll see how that plays out (if anyone has any recs for books I'd love to hear them). My airpods are constantly in my ears - my music taste is also all over the place but some common faces on my playlists include Drake, don tolliver, bryson tiller, joey bada$$, brent, and weston estate. Favorite movie without a shadow of a doubt would be rush hour 2 - I'm weak when it comes to shows and havent been able to really make progress in anything. A cool fun fact about me would have to be that I've never had any coffee in my life to this point. Really excited to be a part of the Tsade class and TAMID and I can't wait to meet everyone and start on this incredible journey!

name: Pranav Rana
intro: Hey guys! My name is Pranav and I'm from North Brunswick, NJ (like 10 mins from Rutgers). I'm a second year studying CS (AI concentration) with a math minor and hope to join TC. One of my dreams in life is to just travel the world and I have been fortunate enough to have visited many incredible countries throughout my life, including Kenya and Tanzania this past summer. I love learning new skills and this summer I decided to try to improve my photography. I'm not the best, but I'm hoping to get better at landscape, astrophotography, and color-grading/editing, so if you're into any of those please lmk. In my free time I love hitting the gym, playing poker, or going to a hall and watching a movie (my favorites are Interstellar, Everything Everywhere All at Once, and Whiplash (kinda basic but they're popular for a reason lmao)). I love playing spikeball and was recently introduced to rock climbing, but I haven't done those anywhere near how much I should so if anyone ever wants to I'm always down. Though I haven't started any in a while, I also love watching TV Shows with some of my favorites being Breaking Bad, Avatar the Last Airbender, AoT, and One Piece. In terms of music, I'm into anything and everything and I usually just listen to whatever songs I'm into at the time on repeat, but I'd say some artists I go back to a lot include Travis Scott, The Weeknd, Laufey, and Bruno Mars. Super excited to get to know everyone better and can't wait to be a part of the TAMID community!

name: Caroline Dittrich
intro: Grüezi everyone! I am Caroline, and I am from Zug, Switzerland (close to Zurich), but I am also half German, a quarter Slovakian, and a quarter Austrian. So, you may be thinking, what am I doing in Boston?! Well, I lived in California when I was younger, from first to fourth grade, and initially learned English there. My parents have always loved Boston, so we visited frequently, and I ended up falling in love with this city. I guess it's also as European as America gets...kinda! Also, my brother is a senior at NEU studying CS and minoring in Business, so I've always known a little about the amazing community here! I am a second-year Business Admin major with a concentration in corporate innovation and management, and I hope to join the consulting track but I am still open to all options. Also, I did the NUin program in Glasgow, Scotland, which was a unique experience. A little bit more about me is that I love traveling, am a huge foodie (love to bake and prepare cheese fondue), play the violin, like to read, enjoy fashion, will absolutely spend over 6 hours skiing (huge surprise there), am passionate about films (send recs!), appreciate Rally racing (great adrenaline), and love to play tennis and golf. Also, my music taste is bizarre; you could totally catch me listening to The Beatles, Kali Uchis, Al Green, Rachmaninoff, or Swedish House Mafia...the genre depends on the day! I am really looking forward to getting to know everyone in TAMID!!

name: Evan Lewellyn
intro: Hey, I'm Evan! I'm from Memphis Tennessee, but I've moved like 7 times in my life because my parents were both in the Navy- there's a lot of cons to moving a lot, but I am definitely grateful for the chance to live places like Italy, Virginia Beach, and Florida. I'm a first year studying Business and Econ (still considering concentrations, and DEF open to any advice/tips), and am hoping to join the consulting track. I chose Northeastern because I want to travel and gain experience for my future careers, and I believe this is the best place to be for those qualities. I also play a lot of instruments (piano, guitar, singing, F horn, etc.), and love to learn/listen to music. My favorite artists right now have gotta be Steve Lacy, Travis Scott, and Daniel Caesar (going to the Daniel Caesar concert in like 2 weeks). Some penchants of mine are soccer, weight-lifting, watching movies, and skiing- fun fact: I won a state championship in soccer but kinda got carried because I was injured pretty much the entire last half of the season. My favorite movies/shows are Avatar the Last Airbender, The Martian, and Barbenheimer (I'm counting them as the same movie cuz I saw them back2back). I also love cooking, reading (even tho I'm soooo inconsistent with reading books), and watching soccer (big Man City fan, sorry). I'm looking forward to connecting with y'all about anything TAMID, or anything not TAMID ofc.

name: Bach Pham
intro: Hi everybody! My name is Bach Pham (Bak is kinda how you pronounce it) and I'm a second year from Hanoi, Vietnam but I went to high school in Byfield (about 40 mins away from Boston). I am majoring in Fintech and Computer Science, and I hope to be on the Investment Fund track. I love way too many things to even mention them all but I'm gonna try to keep the list short. I love bartending, cooking, coffee, photography, driving, colognes, playing guitar, piano, soccer and ice hockey. Although I did play ice hockey in high school (and that's why I love it), I barely watched any of the NHL games. My ideal weekend day would be waking up, make my own coffee (from grinding the beans to dripping them), talk to my friends, cook a dish that fits the day's weather and go out to have some fun at night. Let me know if y'all want to do that sometimes. I also love my colognes, and would love to go cologne shop with anyone of you guys too. I usually have my headphones on (with rnb music on most of the time) so if you see me, just tap my shoulders and say hi! Anyways, I am super excited to be a part of TAMID and get to know y'all.

name: Cat Ehrling
intro: hey everyone! i'm Cat and i'm a second year finance and accounting concentration. i am originally from Miami, FL where i have lived my whole life. i wanted to experience an actual winter here in Boston, which i am definitely still getting used to, but i like to think i'm building up my tolerance! i am interested in the investment fund track, but think all of them are super cool. in my free time i love to play soccer on the intramural team. i'm also a huge barca fan and love man city and liverpool. i also love just playing any sports like picking up tennis with my friends or attempting spike ball. i also really want to play pickleball. so if you're ever down to watch a game or play probably any sport im always in! im also super into music i love travis scott, bad bunny, don toliver, metro, the weeknd, and kali uchis. one thing about me is i will obsess over a few songs for as long as i can, then move onto a new set. so please reach out w some good recs!! i also love to play cello and piano in my free time, and i like to listen to classical music on occasion. im not a big movie person, but if i am going to watch one, i like horror/thriller and comedies, again i would love some good recs! my favorite show of all time is avatar the last airbender, which i have rewatched a few too many times... i also love criminal minds, money heist, how i met your mother, and modern family. also i absolutely love coffee. i like to make my own but definitely hit me up if you want to try cool coffee shops, i've really only tried pavement and tatte here so far, but would love to explore and honestly just have a good excuse to have coffee! anyway! i'm so excited to be a part of TAMID this semester and look forward to getting to know everyone and making some amazing memories!!!

name: Nina Christofilis
intro: Hi all! I'm Nina and I am from Seattle, Washington. I am a second year studying Business with an Entrepreneurship concentration and a Creative Writing minor! In my free time I coach a soccer team of 1st and 2nd graders in the South End and spend a lot of time on my podcast, The Ladyboss Podcast! I also enjoy writing poetry and re watching The Office. I have three siblings, all of which are basketball players. I am an avid basketball fan although never spent time on the court myself. My sport of choice is soccer, although I dabble in tennis, pickle ball and for a short time period, competitive powerlifting. I love EDM music, chocolate and fashion but most importantly am overly obsessed with my maltipoo Charlie back at home. Currently scheming with my 13 year old sister as to what we dress him up as for halloween. Open to suggestions. I look forward to meeting you all and am super excited to be apart of TAMID!

name: Adya Chatterjee
intro: Hi everyone! My name is Adya and I'm a second year from Singapore studying International Business and Math with a concentration in finance! I'm on the men's rowing team at Northeastern. I'm trying to get into boxing right now, and I love lifting! I'm also a super super super duper big foodie and will literally eat anything and everything. I actually went to a Polish restaurant yesterday and the pierogis truly healed my soul. My favorite meal is probably dim sum. If you ever need a food buddy for any cuisine I will always say yes! I also really love traveling and am trying to make it a goal to make as many cheap solo trips to as many countries in the world as I can. I am super spontaneous and love to just explore so I will be down for any random adventure. So excited to get to know everyone in TAMID!

name: Jaden Greenberg
intro: Hey guys! I'm Jaden and I'm a second year majoring in international business with a concentration on marketing. I was born in Toronto and have lived in New York, North Carolina, Kentucky, and Cali but have been in Salt Lake City the past couple years and strongly believe that Utah is a very underrated state. I was a part of NUin Berlin which was an awesome experience but so far I've liked being in Boston and want to explore the city more this semester. I come from a big tennis family and played competitively throughout middle and high school and am currently on Northeastern's club team. I also try to play basketball and soccer some even tho I'm not very good. My favorite shows are breaking bad, money heist, and succession (which I started recently), but I'm terrible about finishing shows. I also enjoy watching NBA and UFC, as well as stand up comedy. I listen to a lot of different music but some of my favorite artists rn are j cole, montell fish, future, and nas. I love to travel and explore new places, this past summer I backpacked through Europe for 2 months. I'm excited to be a part of Tamid and get to know everybody better!

name: Yuvraj Gohil
intro: Hey everyone! My name is Yuvraj Gohil, but everyone usually calls me Yuvi (Pronounced like the letters U-V). I'm from Wayne, NJ and can easily say that the east coast is the place to be. I am currently a Computer Science Major with a minor in Entrepreneurship. I was part of the NU Bound Program in the Bay Area and really enjoyed my time out in California. Definitely caught some nice views, had entertaining nights in San Fran, and met a lot of amazing people along that journey. (Also rode a horse on a mountain overlooking the water for the first time which might be a top life experience for me so far). When it comes to studies and professional life, I love the power that machine learning has to be able to transform data into insights, making the seemingly impossible both possible and practical. On the business side, I'm interested in technical solutions for portfolio optimization by harnessing data-driven intelligence to maximize returns and manage risks. Aside from that, I'm a big sports guy and I love playing baseball, tennis, and basketball. Very big Yankees fan btw. Unlike most of you guys, I might be the worst cook to walk this planet. However, my talented twin sister runs a food Instagram where she cooks and rates food, where I am occasionally featured. Drop a follow @sexymoodyfoody. I'm a very big movie guy and can have hour long conversations about movies that interest me. I also play an Indian Classical Music percussion called tabla, and I have been learning and performing for 12 years now. Very big music guy, I think it can get a person into the right headspace to feel a certain way or to accomplish their tasks. If you every see me walking around campus with my Airpods in, with a serious look on my face, I'll let you in on a little secret, I'm probably not even listening to rap but someone like Charlie Puth, Doja Cat, or SZA. For fun, I love to explore new parts of the city, walk around and hangout, get food, spend time in nature, and play sports. Lmk if you guys have any recs for things to do or places to visit. With all that being said, I'm very excited to get to know each and everyone of you throughout the course of my TAMID experience.

name: Noam Morali
intro: Hey all, My name is Noam Morali, and I'm a second year studying Business administration with a concentration in Finance. This is only my second semester in Boston, as I did NUin Rome in the Fall of 2022 (and became a huge advocate for studying abroad). I was born and raised in NYC, to French & Israeli parents, which definitely felt strange and confusing at times. Some things I love to do are play and follow soccer, basketball & hockey, play chess & monopoly, and most of all, travel to places I've never been to. I'm very excited to join this community and I'm definitely looking forward to meeting you all!

name: Anna Xu
intro: Hi guys! I'm Anna Xu, and I'm from Lexington, MA, which is just 25 minutes outside of Boston. I'm a Business Admin major concentrating in Finance and Business Analytics, with a minor in Data Science. I've lived in Massachusetts for essentially my whole life, but I frequently travel back to China every year to visit my relatives. My mom is from Fuzhou, and my dad is from Qingdao. We visited this past summer and also stopped by Japan to visit Tokyo, Osaka, Kyoto, and Kobe City! I love traveling, playing the violin, cooking/baking, and engaging in photography and film. My favorite movies of all time are La La Land, Interstellar, and Inception (Christopher Nolan is the reason becoming a director is a dream of mine), and some of my favorite shows are Friends, Queen's Gambit, ATLA, and Ozark. I also love trying out new cafes so if anyone is up for it, I'm always here :) I've also been learning the guitar for almost a month now, but it's usually just me practicing in my room with my roommate (she's my teacher). Traveling is one of my family's favorite things to do, and I'd say some of my favorite places I've visited were Iceland, Japan, South Korea, Peru, and Italy! I love music and mostly listen to indie/indie-rock, but my favorite artists are The Backseat Lovers, Her's, Steve Lacy, The Neighborhood, Dominic Fike, Taylor Swift, and The Temper Trap. I'm beyond excited to get to know all of you and bond over anything, from the food we love (sushi, noodles, BIBIMBAP, curry, etc.) to our mindsets and career goals. See you all soon!

name: Druv Robinson
intro: Hey guys. My name is Druv Robinson and I am a first year Business Administration and Political Science major. I was born in a small town right outside of Little Rock, Arkansas, but I have moved too many times (Arkansas, Kansas, Mississippi, New Jersey, Arkansas again, Texas) throughout my life. I graduated from a city just north of Dallas so for now I consider Texas as "home." I enjoy being active, so I love things like playing basketball (lmk if you want to run pick-up), running (ill be running my first marathon this october!), hiking, and really anything outdoors. Traveling is also a hobby of mine. I enjoy going anywhere and everywhere, it's cool seeing places that are so different from what you're used to. One of my bucket list items is to visit all 63 National Parks and stay overnight at each location. Trying new foods and eating a lot of them is something I want to get more into here in Boston (im over IV dining and need some good food recs). My music taste is pretty scattered, I like a lot of old R&B like Sade, Erykah Badu, and SWV, I'm also into a little yacht rock like Steely Dan and the Eagles, I like KAYTRANADA and Men I Trust, my top three rappers at this moment are Veeze, Rio, and Westside Gunn, and then since I'm from the south I'll listen to a little country every now and then. I'm excited to see what this community has to offer, can't wait to meet you all!

name: Grace Ward
intro: Hi everyone! My name is Grace Ward, I'm from Marion, MA but tell everyone I'm from Cape Cod (Marion is not technically on the Cape but close enough). I'm a Health Science and Business Admin major with a concentration in Healthcare Management and Consulting. I have also lived in Burlington, VT, Chinle, AZ, and Los Angeles, CA so I like to believe I am equal parts East and West Coast though I do think East Coast is superior. I was here in the Fall and have absolutely loved exploring Boston, my favorite things to do on the weekend are go out to eat, walk around, and lock in at BPL. In high school, I played soccer and was captain of my tennis team. I also was class president for four years and was the ultimate student gov kid (currently in SGA too!) Outside of school, I love to just hang out with friends explore new places, and play pickleball, please hit me up for a game of pickleball once it gets a little warmer! My favorite movie of all time is 500 Days of Summer and my favorite show is Arrested Development, I have watched both an absurd amount of times. I have two younger siblings, a sister and brother, and a dog named Romeo who I miss so much. My favorite music artists currently are The Backseat Lovers, Noah Kahan, and Maggie Rogers. A fun fact about me is I have tried (almost) every meal exchange option offered here because I am not a huge fan of the dining halls. I can't wait to meet all of you and please reach out to get coffee or anything! :)

name: Jason Bass
intro: What's up guys, my name is Jason Bass and I'm from Westport, Connecticut. I'm a second-year currently studying finance (probably gonna switch it up), and I'm hoping to join the Investment Fund track. I have always been very into sports and staying healthy and these have been a big part of my lifestyle. I would have to say I am a pretty competitive person and am always down for a challenge or a game (hit me up if you wanna run it). Growing up in Connecticut I found myself very bored so I spent a lot of my time in New York going to events and exploring the city. My sports teams since birth have always been the Knicks, Jets, Mets and Rangers and even though they have been awful in the past some are on the uprise. Some of my other big hobbies are traveling and philanthropy. Being a part of the NUIN Scotland group my 1st year and growing up traveling around the world really opened my eyes to how much of the world I haven't seen and lit a spark in me to travel as much as I can throughout my life. Like traveling, I was introduced to philanthropy work early on by my family and most of our trips would entail some sort of volunteer work to help out where we could. So now in my life philanthropy takes a huge role and I am involved with many different organizations along the east coast as well as internationally. I am super excited to be a part of the TAMID community, and I look forward to meeting all of you and getting to know you guys better!

name: William Wang
intro: Hey, everyone! I'm Will Wang, and I'm a first year studying Computer Science and Business Administration. I was born in the capital city of Springfield, Illinois, so I'm too familiar with cornfields and Abraham Lincoln. Before invading Northeastern's Boston campus like every other NUin kid, I studied in Madrid and had the time of my life. Before that, I've never really lived in a city for a prolonged period of time, and while I love it, I do miss driving through the more peaceful countrysides while listening to music. If there's one thing you should know about me, it's that I'm OBSESSED with tennis. I haven't been able to play too much, sadly, but I still love the sport (let me know if you like tennis - let's play!). My other hobbies include playing the guitar, beatboxing, and listening to music. Some of my favorite musical artists are John Mayer, Kota the Friend, Denzel Curry, The Strokes, Joji, Cigarettes After Sex, and $uicideboy$. To finish my introduction, a fun fact about me is I kinda hate chocolate.. unless it's Oreo. Sometimes, I get jealous because everyone makes chocolate seem so good. Anyways, I'm SUPER PUMPED to be in TAMID and to meet all of you guys! I can't wait to see you guys around, and I hope y'all have a great day.

name: Eesha Neunaha
intro: Hey everyone! My name is Eesha Neunaha and I'm from just north of Dallas, Texas. I'm a first year, and the past couple months have definitely been a major change from warm weather but I got to see an actual amount of snow for the first time so it was totally worth it! I am a Computer Science and Economics major, and I hope to get involved with the Tech Consulting track! I've had a bunch of random jobs, but my favorite was probably being a camp counselor. Working with kids has always been super fun and rewarding for me, so I did a lot of volunteering related to that too in high school! I like to be active but am the least coordinated person at team sports so I've danced my whole life and also love running (currently training for a marathon with my roomie!). I've gotten to explore Boston a bit more while running, and have found so many cool spots. I grew up watching the Cowboys, but since being here you'll probably always find me at a NU hockey game. I'm into all kinds of different music and love making playlists- my current playlist atm is a weird mix of don toliver, gracie abrams, miley cyrus, and zach bryan but it works. I've watched NCIS, Suits, Gilmore Girls, and Madam Sec in their entirety, so now I just rewatch them because I hate finding new shows. And also always down for a good old disney show throwback. I love to travel and have a mile-long list of places I want to go (along with all of the food I'll be eating there!) When I'm home, I love hanging out with my lab/shepherd dog named Lori. Looking forward to getting to know everyone and being a part of TAMID!!

name: Andrea Vass
intro: Hey guys! My name is Andrea Vass, all my friends call me Dre though. I'm from Long Island NY. I am currently first year with a business admin major with a concentration in finance. I'm also super interested in entrepreneurship and hope to have a business of my own one day and I'm considering adding on a corporate innovation concentration! I have lived on Long Island my whole life and I love it, I definitely miss good bagels since being here in Boston. Butttt I do LOVE the city of Boston and have enjoyed exploring everything it has to offer. Some of my favorite things to do here are to go on walks, take pictures, and try out new restaurants. I also love to travel - my favorite place I have been is definitely Greece. My parents are both also originally from Hungary so Hungarian was actually my first language and we have visited family there a bunch! I also grew up playing soccer my whole life and my family is a huge Juventus fan. I love to binge-watch shows, currently watching Gilmore Girls and I love it. I am also a dog lover and have a two-year-old Havanese named Bean who I make my mom send vlogs of every day!!! I'm super excited to get to know everyone and to be a part of the TAMID community!!!

name: Brian Stabile
intro: Hey everybody! My name is Brian Stabile and I'm from Long Island, NY. I'm a first year Business Admin major with a concentration in Finance. I was a part of NUin Scotland for the first semester and it was such an amazing experience. I love traveling and learning about all new cultures so if you have any cool travel experiences I'd love to hear! I've enjoyed getting acclimated to Boston and cannot wait to continue to explore the many things the city has to offer! I am a HUGE foodie so I'll take any restaurant recommendations you have! As far as getting involved on campus goes I could not be more excited to join this wonderful TAMID community so thank you all for being so welcoming! I am looking forward to participating in IFC this semester and learning more about the technicalities of finance and look forward to joining Fund in the future! Outside of academics though I love sports (I'm a NY Giants fan at heart, ik ouch), shopping, and playing golf. I can play the saxophone and love listening to music (mostly classic rock). I also trained in MMA for about 10 years until we went remote during covid (not much fun sparring through Zoom :)) I cannot wait to get to know everybody and I'm looking forward to all the amazing things to come!!!

name: Kaley Yang
intro: Hi guys! My name is Kaley Yang and I'm from the Bay Area but more specifically Palo Alto! I'm a first year Business Admin and Data Science major with a concentration in finance. I was in NU.In Rome for my first semester and that was such a great experience. I especially loved the 2 Euro delicious home-made gelato. Adjusting to the Boston weather is definitely tough... But I'm still really enjoying being here so far! I loveeee food, and have been trying to find good KBBQ places so if anyone knows a good place lmk! In addition to loving food, I also like being active and love to workout, so some of my favorite things to do are surf, hike, cycle, and play pickle ball. I also really like TV and some of my favorite shows include How I Met Your Mother, Gilmore Girls, and Suits! I'm super excited to be apart of TAMID and I'm looking forward to meeting everyone!

name: Dev Shah
intro: Hi everyone! My name is Dev Shah and I am from Philadelphia, PA. I am a first year Economics and Business Admin major with a concentration in finance. I was in Boston last semester and enjoyed the good weather up until December. I am half Indian and half Cambodian, and was a vegetarian my whole life up until last year, so I am excited to try new foods, and would appreciate any good food recs. I have been a Philly Sports fan since I was young and is a part of my identity. I love the Sixers, Eagles, and Phillies (even though the last few years have not been nice to us) and will support them until I die. Some of my hobbies include playing Ultimate Frisbee, Basketball, and Cooking. I am on the Ultimate team here at Northeastern and hope to lead the B team to a regional chip. I will occasionally play pick-up basketball at Marino, so hit me up if you want to play. Finally, cooking has been something of a recent hobby where I enjoy learning new recipes and trying to replicate them. I listen to all types of music and it depends on the day. When I want to lock in, I listen to Joe Hisaishi, who wrote the music for Studio Ghibli. Right now, I am really into R&B, like Rihanna, old Drake, Ashanti, and Alicia Keys. Something I really want to do is go to Europe, especially Switzerland, Spain, and France. Another goal I have is to go to law school and become an M&A lawyer. My favorite shows are Modern Family, New Girl, and Suits. I'm excited to get to know everyone and become a part of this community.

name: Naisha Mistry
intro: Hi everyone! My name is Naisha Mistry, and I'm a first-year Data Science major from Northern Virginia (45 minutes outside of DC). I did my first semester in NUin Greece, which was an amazing experience because I love to travel! I also adore sunsets and my hotel was on the boardwalk, so it was nice to see the sunset after school every day! Boston has been great so far (I like the cold and snow is my favorite weather so I don't mind it too much), and I love food and photography so I'm trying to explore local restaurants/cafes to add to my long collection of food pics! I'm also a huge F1 fan, but I've started to get into hockey and you can definitely find me at a Northeastern hockey game! In my free time, I like reading, baking, and watching movies/TV - mostly Bollywood & Hollywood movies and my favorite TV shows are The Office, Gilmore Girls, and Suits. I also play the piano and guitar, am constantly listening to music (I basically live off of Spotify), and mostly listen to R&B, pop, and chill. I can't wait to meet everyone and become involved with the TAMID community!!

name: Adit Karode
intro: Hey guys! My name is Adit Karode and I'm from San Ramon in the Bay Area, CA. I'm a second year Computer Science major and a Business Administration minor. I live in the Bay now, but I was born in Sayreville, New Jersey and moved from there to Pune, India when i was 10. In my free time if I'm not hanging out with my friends, I'm probably doing one of three things, watching tv/movies, playing FIFA or working out. My favorite sports team is Chelsea FC (Soccer), but I'm a big Warriors fan as well. I like the NY Giants as well, but it's best not to mention that in New England. I usually host watch parties with my friends for bigger games, and if anyone is interested you have an open invite. I'm a big foodie and in my first year here in Boston I've been exploring different areas solely based off of the restaurants they have, some of my favorites have been Barcelona in South End, Q restaurant in Chinatown and Batifol in Cambridge have been my top visits so far. I'm also big into exploring different genres of music, my favorite artists at least right now are Fred Again, Kodak Black, Arijit Singh and F.U.N. I'm looking forward to learning about everyone else in TAMID as well!

name: Jacob Chen
intro: Hey everyone! I'm Jacob, and I'm from Newton, MA but lived the first half of my life in NJ. I'm a first year majoring in Computer Science, but I might switch to pure Math. With my free time, I love to explore new things around the Boston area, from food places to networking events. When I'm not feeling Steast, my go-to lunch spot is Gyroscope. I recently attended the HBS Tech Club Conference and got to meet a lot of cool people. My hobbies include playing sports (literally anything), eating, and listening to music. The teams I support are all over the place: Yankees, Celtics, Pats, Bayern. Some of my favorite artists include Cordae, Cigs after Sex, Kanye, Nujabes, and I also listen to a lot of classical. One of my short-term goals is to start going to the gym, and one of my long-term goals is to build a successful startup. If anyone is looking to bounce startup ideas off of someone, hit me up :). Anyways, I'm looking forward to getting to know you all!

name: Naman Rusia
intro: Hey Everyone! my name is Naman and I'm from Singapore. I am a first year majoring in Computer Science and Business Administration (thinking of concentrating in Finance or Fintech, not sure yet), and minoring in Mathematics (tentative). Growing up, I watched a lot of soccer, and I am a proud Arsenal fan (don't really watch much anymore). I love watching TV shows, coding and just hanging out. I am a big fan of Breaking bad, Suits, Brooklyn 99, and How I met Your Mother. I love listening to music. I am really into RnB and Indie, and Rock. I am a big fan of Sam Fender, John Mayer (big fan of his live music), Drake, Ye (his old stuff mostly), Sonder and Travis Scott. I also really enjoy travellng (been to 16 countries and counting!). Growing up in South East Asia I explored a lot and definitely want to travel to South America soon (I really want to visit Brazil and Argentina). One more thing I am looking forward to is learning to cook at my dorm next year (hopefully I can avoid starting a major fire). I am always looking to be involved on campus, and I am currently a part of Forge and Oasis. Reach out to me if you want to learn about any of my projects in these clubs please do reach out! I'm really exited about being at TAMID! Would love to grab coffee or food around campus, so reach out to me if you are interested. I'm primarily thinking about joining TC and joining TCF this semester, but i'm open to the other tracks as well. Really excited to meet everyone!

name: Rio Quinn
intro: Hello Everyone! My name is Rio Quinn and I am a first-year student studying math and business. I am from Millbrook, NY which is a tiny town in the middle of the woods about an hour north of Weschester. During the fall, I was part of the N.U.in Rome program and I had a super amazing experience there. I am interested in joining the Tech Consulting track as it blends my interests of business and STEM so I am looking forward to TCF. Outside of school, I love to stay active. I go to the gym a lot to lift weights and run. I enjoy hiking, and I have climbed almost every mountain in the Tetons in Wyoming so ask me about that if you are interested. Skiing is also a passion of mine, and my favorite places to ski in NY are Catamount and Hunter mountain. I also love playing sports, and in high school I played soccer, hockey, and lacrosse. I am really excited to be a part of TAMID and I can't wait to meet everybody!

name: Shreya Nanda
intro: HI everyone!!! I'm Shreya and I am a second year computer science major concentrating in AI with a minor in marketing. I am super interested in the tech consulting track and look forward to meeting everyone!! I am from Edison, NJ and am a lover of everything jersey especially the shore and six flags. I also loveeeeee NYC and go all the time with my friends or family for a quick day trip. As for my hobbies, I have always loved doing my nails and even do my friends and family's nails now. So if anyone needs a local nail tech, check out my insta: shreya.does.nails. I love to listening to music especially Tate Mcrae, I have been her day one fan, but also Drake, Travis Scott, Sza, The Weeknd, and so many more. I also love going to concerts and have been to like 10 concerts so far. Some fun facts about me: 1) I have 2 tattoos: one of my dog and one of a jeep since it is my favorite car and I love to travel (I have been all over the world like Peru, Egypt, Greece, Italy and more). 2) I have a cutie little shih tzu at home named Leo and love him with all my heart. 3) I am a 3rd degree black belt in TaeKwonDo. 4) I AM A HUGE FOODIE!!! I love cooking and trying new restaurants all the time. I am so excited to be apart of TAMID and can't wait to know everyone!

name: Raghav Sharma
intro: What's up everyone, my name is Raghav Sharma. I'm a first-year studying finance and economics. I'm from Saudi Arabia, but I was born in Houston, and went to boarding school in Connecticut. Professionaly I am super interested in app development and start-up culture, and I'm hoping to join the Investment Fund and potentially consulting. I like doing anything outside and love playing all sorts of sports, but primarily running, golf, tennis, and football. I also love watching all of those and am a HUGE Steelers fan (Rodgers is my goat) and the standard is the standard. I listen to a pretty wide range of music from old stuff like Erykah Badu, Sade, Neil Young, The Beatles, to newer stuff like Future, Drake, and Rocky. Outside of that, I love travelling and cooking, some of my favorite spots I've been to are Greece, Morocco, the Bahamas, and Vienna. I'm pretty good at making pizza, chicken biryani, and chicken teriyaki so I'm definitely looking forward to getting a kitchen next year. I'm a huge Christopher Nolan fan, but my favorite movie is probably The Martian, or The Shawshank Redemption, I've also seen pretty much every sitcom and I'm now starting Better Call Saul, and True Detective. Looking forward to getting to know everyone!

name: Zach Burnstine
intro: Hey everyone! My name is Zach Burnstine and I'm a sophomore studying data science and finance. I'm from a little town in the LA area called La Canada and came to Northeastern to experience something totally different (still can't say I'm used to Boston weather). After education, I'm really interested in joining the consulting track and potentially tech consulting. I spend a lot of my free time outdoors and staying active. Most notably, I love playing golf. I find it incredibly therapeutic spending my day outdoors on a golf course and there truly is no better feeling in life than a perfectly struck iron. Apart from that, I love pickup basketball, poker with friends, and I'm looking to get back into playing pickleball once it gets a little warmer outside. In terms of music, I've been listening to a lot of older music like Fleetwood Mac, Steely Dan and Supertramp. Some of my favorite movies are the Shawshank Redemption, Whiplash, The Truman Show, and Good Will Hunting. I generally wouldn't consider myself the biggest tv watcher, but I recently watched Severance and really loved it. If anyone has recommendations, definitely let me know! I'm super excited to be a part of TAMID and I'm really looking forward to getting to know you all!
